creator: freebsd@peterk.org
text:
Also,
 FreeBSD sed needs a space after -i in 'google_oslogin_control'

's/sed -i/sed -i /g'

example:
crook:$ sed -i"" 's/z/aaa/g' /tmp/letter.sh 
sed: 1: "/tmp/letter.sh": extra characters at the end of l command
crook:$ 
crook:$ sed -i "" 's/z/aaa/g' /tmp/letter.sh
crook:$
